title: Flame's PvP Modpack
description: This is the modpack that i personally use.
body:
This is The modpack i use for youtube, SMP's, and everything!!! This modpack includes everything that will help you get better at pvping, from seeing your armor's durability, to the time left remaining of your potions.

Mod's include:  
[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)             
[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)     
[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)     
[Armor Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-hud)     
[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)     
[Drippy Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/drippy-loading-screen)     
[Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)    
[FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu)     
[Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)     
[Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)     
[ReplayMod](https://www.replaymod.com/download/)     
[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)     
[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)     
[Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars)     
[TierTagger](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiertagger)
EDIT: Some servers have freecam BANNABLE, so disable it!

This list does not include library mods.
Please note that some mods may not be allowed on specific servers, such as freecam or replay mod, but are fine on pvp servers and on any server if you dont use them.

Enjoy PvPing :D
